title: Anthropic Surpasses OpenAI In Valuation After Massive $65 Billion Funding Round
description: Anthropic has overtaken OpenAI as the world's most valuable artificial intelligence startup after raising $65 billion in a new funding round.

title: AI Drives U.S. Trade Dynamics Amid Global Tensions
description: In April, the U.S. experienced a narrowed trade deficit as exports surged amid rising imports. The growth is largely due to investments in artificial intelligence and increased petroleum exports, despite ongoing tensions with Iran impacting global shipping routes. Economists warn this trend may not be sustainable.
